---
title: "Microplastics and POPs on the Southwestern Atlantic deep-sea floor: a study of megafauna and sediments"
date: 2026-03-01
author:
  - name: Stefanelli-Silva, Gabriel
  - name: De Melo, Marcelo R.S.
  - name: Pascoal, Diego R.C.
  - name: Dipold, Jessica
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus U.
  - name: Freitas, Anderson Z.
  - name: Taniguchi, Satie
  - name: Montone, Rosalinda C.
  - name: Sumida, Paulo Y.G.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Marine Pollution Bulletin"
  volume: 224
  doi: "10.1016/j.marpolbul.2025.119148"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Microplastics and POPs on the Southwestern Atlantic deep-sea floor: a study of megafauna and sediments</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
